units: lengths in mm, angles in deg
provenance: Link parameters back-fitted from 10 real flange-centre (joint, pose) pairs captured 2026-05-28 (config/calibration_pairs.json) via least squares. Joint-fit residual < 0.01 mm / 0.001 deg across all 10. NOT from a datasheet — re-calibrate (re-fit) if the mechanism, joint zeroing, or measurement reference (e.g. adding a TCP/jig) changes.
model_notes: Parallelogram 4-axis arm: J2/J3 each set their link's ABSOLUTE angle (decoupled), the linkage keeps the flange vertical. NOT a serial 6-DOF DH chain.
theta2 = J2 measured from vertical (J2=0 -> rear arm vertical); theta3 = J3 from horizontal (J3=0 -> forearm horizontal). Data-confirmed: no angle offsets needed.
r = j1_coeff*J1 + j4_coeff*J4 + offset_deg; wrap=false -> r may exceed +/-180 (verified: configs with J1+J4 > 180 report r > 180).
Origin on the J1 rotation axis; +X = forward; +Z = up (z<0 = flange below origin). Pose is the FLANGE CENTRE (no TCP offset).
joint_limits_deg are the theoretical single-axis ranges. Real hardware has a coupled J2/J3 travel limit (Phase 2b safety). FK does NOT enforce limits.
